act_collect_ice.context: Action entry. label=Collect Ice; flavor=Send drones to scrape usable ice from shaded cuts.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_decode_signal.context: Action entry. label=Decode Signal; flavor=Spend power on the recurring buried transmission.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_grow_rations.context: Action entry. label=Grow Rations; flavor=Coax calories from the first greenhouse trays.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_open_airlock.context: Action entry. label=Open Airlock; flavor=Prepare the final controlled exposure sequence.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_print_spares.context: Action entry. label=Print Spares; flavor=Fabricate emergency parts from stored feedstock.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_reroute_power.context: Action entry. label=Reroute Power; flavor=Balance batteries and sun-starved circuits.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_run_atmo_processor.context: Action entry. label=Pulse Atmo Processor; flavor=Fire a slow terraforming processor cycle.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_seed_bioreactor.context: Action entry. label=Seed Bioreactor; flavor=Wake the sealed microbe vats.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_sift_regolith.context: Action entry. label=Sift Regolith; flavor=Sort dust and rock for useful feedstock.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_stabilize_dome.context: Action entry. label=Stabilize Dome; flavor=Tune pressure and thermal flex in the outer dome.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_survey_crater.context: Action entry. label=Survey Crater; flavor=Map an old impact scar beyond the beacons.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.

act_vent_co2.context: Action entry. label=Vent CO2; flavor=Core life-support action; scrubbers cough awake.; result_1..4 are varied immediate success lines.
